articles.summary: Wedbush recently increased its price target for Palo Alto Networks (PANW) to $300 from $225, maintaining an Outperform rating. articles.title: GLJ Research Upgrades First Solar (FSLR) to Buy
articles.summary: GLJ Research upgraded First Solar (FSLR) to Buy from Hold, setting a price target of $315, citing resolved cancellation risks and the launch of its Series 6 CuRe technology. This follows a similar upgrade by Freedom Broker earlier in the month, which foresaw increased domestic demand due to Section 232 tariffs. First Solar reported a strong Q1 2026 with record revenue and margin expansion, benefiting from its differentiated technology and independence from Chinese supply chains.

articles.title: Regeneron (REGN) Says EMA Accepted Review for Otarmeni Application
articles.summary: Regeneron Pharmaceuticals, Inc. (REGN) announced that the European Medicines Agency (EMA) has accepted for accelerated review its Marketing Authorization Application for Otarmeni. This gene therapy targets biallelic OTOF variant-associated hearing loss and, if approved, would be the first for OTOF-related hearing loss in the EU. The application is supported by data from the pivotal CHORD trial, though the company recently faced downward price target adjustments from analysts following a missed primary endpoint in a separate Phase 3 study.
articles.content: Regeneron Pharmaceuticals, Inc. (REGN) announced that the European Medicines Agency (EMA) has accepted for accelerated review its Marketing Authorization Application for Otarmeni. This gene therapy targets biallelic OTOF variant-associated hearing loss and, if approved, would be the first for OTOF-related hearing loss in the EU. The application is supported by data from the pivotal CHORD trial, though the company recently faced downward price target adjustments from analysts following a missed primary endpoint in a separate Phase 3 study.

articles.summary: This article analyzes Schlumberger (SLB) after a significant 70% surge over the past year, questioning if it still offers value. The article also presents "Narratives" for investors to create their own forecasts, offering bullish and bearish perspectives on SLB's future valuation.
